title: (BUG) Unboost leaves orphan notifications (no FK cascade)
description: posting.rs unreblog path (line 2382) deletes the boost post with bare `DELETE FROM posts WHERE id = ?` but never cleans up referencing rows in notifications, favourites, or bookmarks. Those tables have no ON DELETE CASCADE on their post_id FK. With foreign_keys=true in the connection, this delete would fail if any notification references the boost post (e.g. a 'reblog' notification). In practice a boost post won't have favourites/bookmarks, but notifications table stores reblog notifications with the boost's post_id — so unboosting a post that triggered a notification to the original author will hit a FK violation error at runtime.
